case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TRESURER VS. TANYA ROBERTSON

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TRESURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, TANYA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TRESURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, TANYA $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,046.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $45.99 SERVED OCT-18-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, TANYA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TRESURER & TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-13-2017 - APPEARACE BY PLINTIFF ONLY. AFTER HEARING, MATTER IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506). NO EXHIBIT RETAINED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TRESURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT ROBERTSON, TANYA
